definition: a hot or cold drink made from roasted coffee beans
example2: This coffee smells fresh.

definition: a small place that serves coffee, drinks, and light food

definition: a place where people buy coffee and small snacks

definition: a person who makes and serves coffee drinks

definition: a list of food and drinks you can buy

definition: to ask for food or a drink in a restaurant or cafe

definition: something that you can drink

definition: a coffee drink with espresso and smooth steamed milk

definition: regular coffee made by pouring hot water through ground coffee

definition: coffee without milk or cream

definition: coffee with most of the caffeine removed

definition: a substance in coffee and tea that can make you feel more awake

definition: a sweet hot drink made with chocolate
